title: Enterprise Knowledge Graph RAG Platform
name: Enterprise Knowledge Graph RAG Platform
description: Developed an enterprise-grade **Knowledge Graph RAG** platform over technical documentation, combining **LangGraph**, **LangChain**, **Neo4j**, and containerized services. Implemented **multi-turn reasoning agents** that integrate graph traversal, pathfinding, and self-correcting retrieval loops to improve answer fidelity on complex technical queries.

title: Master Thesis: Evaluating Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Systems
name: Evaluating Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Systems
description: Master thesis focused on evaluating **multi-turn, tool-using Agentic RAG systems** through a synthetic benchmark generation approach. Built a **LangGraph-based benchmark pipeline** to simulate realistic interaction trajectories, and designed an auditing framework for failure localization and performance analysis across large-scale enterprise retrieval workloads.

title: VectorDrive-Route: Autonomous BEV Trajectory Planning
name: VectorDrive-Route: Autonomous BEV Trajectory Planning
description: Built an end-to-end **PyTorch** pipeline using **nuScenes**, **ResNet**, and depth lifting to project multi-camera perception into a robust **Bird's-Eye-View** representation. Designed a temporal planning head with dedicated **drivable-area** and **occupancy decoders** to generate safe, dynamically feasible trajectories under evolving traffic context.

title: Daten-Mapping-Framework fur die AAS
name: Daten-Mapping-Framework fur die AAS
description: Engineered a data mapping framework that transforms heterogeneous enterprise schemas into **Asset Administration Shell** models to enable **Industry 4.0** interoperability. Introduced a dual mapping strategy that separates flat relational structures from hierarchical asset contexts, allowing more reliable automated schema alignment in production environments.

title: See Your World
name: See Your World
description: Built an accessibility-focused image captioning application for people with limited vision, supporting **11 languages** with voice feedback. Engineered the deep learning captioning pipeline and productionized deployment using **TensorFlow**, **Flask**, and **Docker**, with an interface designed for low-friction capture and multilingual audio guidance.
